Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 37 

BLOOD_PT_FRNSH_QTY 

LABEL: Blood Pints Furnished Quantity 

DESCRIPTION: The number of whole pints of blood furnished to the beneficiary during the stay. 

SHORT NAME: BLDFRNSH 

LONG NAME: BLOOD_PT_FRNSH_QTY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the blood pints furnished quantity from all claim records included in
